items.name_en: Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
items.name_cn:
Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
Large Irapala palm fiber and calfskin 🐂
basket handbag
Lots of celebrities have this
A traditional basket handbag
Features a classic hand-woven tubular calfskin strap and a calfskin 🐽🐽 embossed patch
This smaller size is made from Irapala palm, a palm tree grown, harvested, and sun-dried in Colombia, then woven by female artisans guided by fair trade principles at Corporación Oficio y Arte
Due to handcrafting, dimensions may vary slightly, making each purchase unique!
A summer essential woven bag. If you have to choose one bag for summer 👛, it must be a woven bag
Suitable for daily wear and weekend outings, instantly bringing the summer vibe
Anagram basket handbag. A classic hand-woven basket bag. Just throw it on for a vacation look ◇ A summer must-have
Size: 46cm~24cm~15cm

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New 🆕Medium Pleated Nappa Sheepskin Flamenco Coin Purse 💥 It tightens with a drawstring and ties with the signature twisted knot. The medium version is crafted in shiny Nappa sheepskin, hand-cut, stitched, and sewn. *Medium Flamenco fits a large wallet, all models of phones, or an A5 notebook, a 500ml water bottle, and sunglasses case *Crossbody, Shoulder, or Handheld *Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap *Exquisite magnetic closure *Leather lining*
items.name_cn:

Size: 30*24.5*10.5cm

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟 New Latest 🆕 Calfskin mini Puzzle Handbag
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟 New Latest 🆕 Calfskin mini Puzzle Handbag
L 🆕 debut handbag *Rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines* This mini version is made of classic calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most size phones (max 6.1 inch) and sunglasses, worn over the shoulder or crossbody* Handheld or top handle carry* Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap* One internal slip pocket and one external rear zip pocket* Zipper closure with leather pull tab* Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:062312

specs.rawTitle:
